alert_text: P1 INCIDENT: order-service down. inventory-service failing. redis-primary OOM. Production impact across checkout flow.
full_context: Root cause identified: redis-primary hit maxmemory causing evictions and OOM errors. inventory-service depends on redis cache and started falling back to slow db reads. order-service depends on inventory-service and began returning 503s. Customer checkout is broken. You must generate an ordered remediation plan.
log_snippet:
redis-primary: OOM command not allowed
inventory-service: cache miss rate 95%
order-service: 503 error rate 87%
